title: Broken's Explosives
description: This mod adds explosive items to minecraft.
body:
Broken's Explosive is a mod for Forge 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.19.4, and 1.20.1 that adds explosive items.

Current Explosive Items: Grenade

All item recipes are in the gallery.

I will be slowly adding more items and updating the game version over time.
